description: A pilotable CMES (Combat Mechanical Exoskeleton Suit), or it used to be anyway. This is heavily modded to access functions from CBMs how neat! Due to how you built it, it is heavily protected and even more deadly..

use_action.friendly_msg: The Mech whirs into life and opens its restraints to accept a pilot.
use_action.hostile_msg: The Mech unfolds but remains unresponsive.

description: This is an inactive recon hack. Inside of this ball is a small recon drone, with razors, and sharp metals. Nice for stealth or a small room.

use_action.friendly_msg: The drone flies from your hand and surveys the area!
use_action.hostile_msg: You misprogram the recon hack; it's hostile!
